intent: Apologize for a service outage and reassure a customer
key_facts: Outage occurred on April 10th, 2026 between 2 PM and 5 PM IST
Root cause: database failover misconfiguration
Issue has been permanently resolved with automated safeguards
Customer will receive a 20% credit on their next invoice
New monitoring system deployed to prevent recurrence
reference_email:
Subject: Our Sincere Apologies — Service Disruption on April 10th

Dear [Customer Name],

I want to personally apologize for the service disruption you experienced on April 10th between 2:00 PM and 5:00 PM IST. I completely understand how disruptive a three-hour outage can be during business hours, and I am truly sorry for the impact this had on your operations.

The issue was traced to a database failover misconfiguration — a gap we have since permanently resolved by deploying automated safeguards and an enhanced monitoring system to ensure this does not recur.

As a gesture of our commitment to you, we will be applying a 20% credit to your next invoice. More importantly, we have put the systems in place to ensure your experience going forward reflects the reliability you deserve.

Thank you for your patience and continued trust.

Warm regards,
[Your Name]

Subject: Budget Increase Request — Cloud Infrastructure (Urgent)

Dear [Manager Name],

I am writing to request approval for a $15,000 budget increase to our current cloud infrastructure allocation of $50,000.

Following an unexpected 3x traffic spike over the past three weeks, our infrastructure costs have significantly exceeded projections. Without this additional allocation, we will face service performance degradation by the end of April — a risk I want to flag proactively rather than reactively.

To provide context on the business impact: the additional $15,000 directly protects approximately $200,000 in quarterly revenue that depends on sustained service performance. The return on this investment is clear.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss this further at your earliest convenience. Please let me know if you need any supporting data.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
